item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kebersamaan memang menjadi fondasi masyarakat, tetapi itu bukan berarti hak individu ditolak.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that society is often prioritized over individual rights in Indonesia, then visibly narrows that stance into a balance frame where individual freedom is also valued. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, acknowledging social harmony but treating personal autonomy as the stricter limit.
